Know About Us

LiveUSDT (AI Automated Trading Platform) is a top auto-trading robot with advanced chips and a powerful system. Profits can be withdrawn daily, and invested funds are available after the 60-day trading period.

  • VIP1 🔓 Unlocking amount: 20 - 999 USDT (📈 5.5% - 6.6% daily income)
  • VIP2 🔓 Unlocking amount: 1000 - 4999USDT (📈 10% - 11.1% daily income)
  • VIP3 🔓 Unlocking amount: 5000 - 9999USDT (📈 12.5% - 14.2% daily income)
  • VIP4 🔓 Unlocking amount: 10000 - 19999USDT (📈 16.6% - 20% daily income)
  • VIP5 🔓 Unlocking amount: 20000 - 49999USDT (📈 20% - 25% daily income)
  • VIP6 🔓 Unlocking amount: ≥ 50000USDT (📈 25% - 33.3% daily income)

Brand Strength

LiveUSDT has been securely quantifying for over 3 years, with over $3 billion in funds and more than $4 billion in profits generated for users. We are committed to creating value for our users.

With advanced AI technology, a powerful auto-trading system, and high profitability, we ensure you maximize returns on your cryptocurrency investments.

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know so you can use BitUSDT today.

What is AI quantitative trading investment?

AI quantitative trading investment combines artificial intelligence and quantitative analysis to provide efficient and precise investment solutions through automated trading and data analysis, aiming for higher returns and lower risk.

What is USDT?

USDT is a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar, 1 USD = 1 USDT. You can freely buy USDT with any country’s legal currency on Binance, or sell USDT and exchange it for your own country’s currency.

Can earnings be withdrawn daily?

Yes, profits can be withdrawn daily, while the quantitative period is 60 days. The principal investment can only be withdrawn after the period ends.

Is quantitative cryptocurrency trading profitable?

Yes, we have reason to believe that, no matter how complex cryptocurrency may seem, the underlying blockchain technology is extremely secure. Everyone who joins us will be immediately attracted by the substantial profits.

Ready to make sweet money?
